evals.expected_output: Claude should check for existing venv, create .venv if needed, then run .venv/bin/pip install pandas. Should never run bare 'pip install pandas' against system Python.
Claude should check for venv in ~/projects/data-analysis/, create one if needed, then run the script using .venv/bin/python main.py. Should report venv status to user.

evals.prompt: 我有一個新的 Python 專案在 /tmp/test-proj，裡面有 requirements.txt，幫我設定環境並安裝依賴
evals.expected_output: Claude should create .venv in /tmp/test-proj, then install requirements.txt using .venv/bin/pip install -r requirements.txt. Should report what was created and installed.
